name: 17p11_2_Smith_Magenis_Potocki_Lupski
description: 17p11.2 region flanked by SMS-REPs (proximal, middle, distal SD blocks at >98% identity). NAHR causes Smith-Magenis syndrome (deletion) and Potocki-Lupski syndrome (reciprocal duplication). RAI1 is the dosage-sensitive gene.

architecture.internal_structure: Three SMS-REPs (proximal, middle, distal) of ~250 kb at >98% identity, flanking the ~3.7 Mb commonly deleted interval; contains RAI1, MYO15A, FLCN, LLGL1.
